rulings.Case Title: DIGITAL SIGNAGE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. SIGNS AMERICA, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JULY 30, 2007, LINE 3. CROSS-DEFENDANT 3M COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION, BREACH OF EXPRESS WARRANTY; THE GOLDSMITH DECLARATION AND 38:9-16 OF HIS DEPOSITION CREATE TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT BASED ON KEITH V BUCHANAN (1985) 173 CAL APP 13,22 AND CAL. COMM. CODE SECTION 2-313. IN ADDITION RUNDECK TESTIFIED THAT THE SPECIAL WARRANTY COVERS PEELING AND THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO THE ASSIGNMENT OF THE SPECIAL WARRANTY AND THE EXTENT OF ITS COVERAGE. GRANTED AS TO THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION, NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION, SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION AND SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD FOR FAILURE TO ESTABLISH RELIANCE. GRANTED AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES. N.C.L. HAS DISMISSED THE THIRD, FOURTH AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT HINISH VS. STEPHEN VISLOCKY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint;
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JULY 30, 2007, LINE 18. PLAINTIFF ROBERT HINISH'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint IS GRANTED TO ADD CLAIM OF NUISANCE AND TO DELETE CLAIM FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. THE NUISANCE CLAIM IS BASED ON THE SAME FACTS AT ISSUE AND WILL NOT PREJUDICE DEFENDANT. DENY TO ADD CONTRACTOR WITHOUT PREJUDICE. TO ADD A NEW PARTY, AT THIS LATE DATE, WOULD BE PREJUDICIAL. =(302/PJM/CB-X)

rulings.Case Title: AS YOU SOW A NON-PROPFIT CORPORATION VS. QUABAUG CORPORATION INC A CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JULY 30, 2007, LINE 11. DEFENDANT QUABAUG CORPORATION, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT TO ANSWER THE COMPLAINT WITHIN TEN DAYS. CALIFORNIA ALLOWS PAROLE EVIDENCE TO EXPLAIN THE CONTEXT AND MEANING OF WRITTEN AGREEMENTS MASTERSON V SINI (1968) 68 CAL 2D 222; P.G.& E. V THOMAS DRAYAGE & RIGGING CO. (1968) 69 CAL 2D 33. ACCORDINGLY, ALTHOUGH THE LANGUAGE OF THE COVENANT NOT TO SUE MAY APPEAR TO BE CLEAR, IT IS APPROPRIATE TO SUSTAIN THE DEMURRER. =(302/PJM/KD)
